module.name: references
module.description: Bibliography from raw BibTeX. Paste one or more @entries in the body; each is parsed and rendered. Pick a visual style: cards | numbered | apa.

snippet.label: References (cards)
snippet.text:
<!-- @references style: cards -->
@article{einstein1905,
  author = {Einstein, Albert},
  title = {On the Electrodynamics of Moving Bodies},
  journal = {Annalen der Physik},
  volume = {17},
  number = {10},
  pages = {891--921},
  year = {1905}
}
@book{knuth1997,
  author = {Knuth, Donald E.},
  title = {The Art of Computer Programming},
  publisher = {Addison-Wesley},
  year = {1997}
}
<!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Bibliography from BibTeX. style: cards | numbered | apa.

snippet.label: References (numbered)
snippet.text:
<!-- @references style: numbered, title: References -->
@inproceedings{vaswani2017,
  author = {Vaswani, Ashish and Shazeer, Noam and Parmar, Niki},
  title = {Attention Is All You Need},
  booktitle = {Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems},
  year = {2017},
  pages = {5998--6008}
}
<!-- @end -->
